newsSince: Merger-process news confirming the prior thesis. The Skyworks acquisition advanced: as of June 11 Qorvo obtained requisite noteholder consents to strip covenants, Skyworks reported early note-exchange participation, and an S-4 proxy/prospectus was filed. Terms remain $32.50 cash + 0.960 Skyworks share per Qorvo share, removing standalone optionality. No AI-node/CPO content change.

sources.label: Qorvo advances toward Skyworks acquisition, note amendments (TipRanks)
Skyworks reports early participation in Qorvo note exchange (StockTitan)

verdicts.rankRationale: Consistent with the prior down call: QRVO has weak direct AI-node bottleneck exposure (no HBM/advanced-packaging/CPO leverage), and the advancing Skyworks merger (noteholder consents, S-4 filed) removes standalone optionality. Drift-sized down; no new AI-node evidence.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Skyworks merger synergies (RF scale, not AI-node)
verdicts.primaryRisk: No HBM/packaging leverage; deal/arb overhang caps optionality
verdicts.bull: Combined Skyworks-Qorvo RF scale and $500M+ synergies could fund longer-term infrastructure/edge optionality.
verdicts.neutral: RF/analog with negligible AI-node content; valuation now anchored to the merger arb.
verdicts.bear: Merger strips standalone optionality; handset/RF cyclicality and zero direct AI-node bottleneck exposure keep it sliding.

verdicts.rankRationale: Through the CPO lens, QRVO is RF/analog with no co-packaged-optics leverage; the advancing Skyworks acquisition removes the independent infrastructure-optionality angle that prior thesis weakly flagged. Consistent with the 'remove' bias; drift-sized down.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Non-core infrastructure optionality (now subsumed by merger)
verdicts.bull: Merged entity's broader analog/RF portfolio could surface niche optical-adjacent content over time.
verdicts.neutral: No CPO relevance today; investment case is the Skyworks deal, not the bottleneck thesis.
verdicts.bear: Zero co-packaged-optics leverage and deal-driven loss of standalone optionality argue for removal from actionable alpha.
